chinese: 虽然下雨，我们还是去了公园散步。
english: Although it rained, we still went for a walk in the park.
pinyin: Suīrán xiàyǔ, wǒmen háishì qùle gōngyuán sànbù.
parts: 虽|然|下|雨|我|们|还|是|去|了|公|园|散|步

chinese: 他打算暑假回国看望父母。
english: He plans to return home during summer vacation to visit his parents.
pinyin: Tā dǎsuàn shǔjià huíguó kànwàng fùmǔ.
parts: 他|打|算|暑|假|回|国|看|望|父|母

chinese: 这道题比上次考试难多了。
english: This problem is much harder than last exam.
parts: 这|道|题|比|上|次|考|试|难|多|了
pinyin: Zhè dào tí bǐ shàngcì kǎoshì nán duō le.

chinese: 她一边听音乐一边整理房间。
english: She listens to music while tidying the room.
parts: 她|一|边|听|音|乐|一|边|整|理|房|间
pinyin: Tā yībiān tīng yīnyuè yībiān zhěnglǐ fángjiān.

chinese: 我们约好下午三点在咖啡馆见面。
english: We agreed to meet at the cafe at three in the afternoon.
parts: 我|们|约|好|下|午|三|点|在|咖|啡|馆|见|面
pinyin: Wǒmen yuēhǎo xiàwǔ sān diǎn zài kāfēiguǎn jiànmiàn.

chinese: 他因为生病所以没有去上班。
english: He did not go to work because he was sick.
parts: 他|因|为|生|病|所|以|没|有|去|上|班
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi shēngbìng suǒyǐ méiyǒu qù shàngbān.

chinese: 我把护照放在行李箱里了。
english: I put my passport in the suitcase.
parts: 我|把|护|照|放|在|行|李|箱|里|了
pinyin: Wǒ bǎ hùzhào fàng zài xínglixiāng lǐ le.

chinese: 服务员态度很好，我们很感动。
english: The server was very kind; we were moved.
parts: 服|务|员|态|度|很|好|我|们|很|感|动
pinyin: Fúwùyuán tàidù hěn hǎo, wǒmen hěn gǎndòng.

chinese: 地铁二号线直达机场，很方便。
english: Metro line 2 goes straight to the airport; very convenient.
parts: 地|铁|二|号|线|直|达|机|场|很|方|便
pinyin: Dìtiě èr hào xiàn zhídá jīchǎng, hěn fāngbiàn.

chinese: 她建议我们提前半小时出发。
english: She suggested we leave half an hour early.
parts: 她|建|议|我|们|提|前|半|小|时|出|发
pinyin: Tā jiànyì wǒmen tíqián bàn xiǎoshí chūfā.

chinese: 虽然很累，他还是坚持把作业写完。
english: Although tired, he still insisted on finishing homework.
parts: 虽|然|很|累|他|还|是|坚|持|把|作|业|写|完
pinyin: Suīrán hěn lèi, tā háishì jiānchí bǎ zuòyè xiě wán.

chinese: 我们打算周末去郊区爬山看风景。
english: We're planning a weekend hike in the suburbs for the views.
parts: 我|们|打|算|周|末|去|郊|区|爬|山|看|风|景
pinyin: Wǒmen dǎsuàn zhōumò qù jiāoqū páshān kàn fēngjǐng.

chinese: 他把重要的文件备份到硬盘里了。
english: He backed up important files to an external drive.
parts: 他|把|重|要|的|文|件|备|份|到|硬|盘|里|了
pinyin: Tā bǎ zhòngyào de wénjiàn bèifèn dào yìngpán lǐ le.

chinese: 她一边做饭一边跟家人视频聊天。
english: She video-chatted with family while cooking.

pinyin: Tā yībiān zuòfàn yībiān gēn jiārén shìpín liáotiān.

chinese: 我们约好明天早上在车站集合。

pinyin: Wǒmen yuēhǎo míngtiān zǎoshang zài chēzhàn jíhé.

chinese: 他因为堵车所以开会迟到了十分钟。
english: He was ten minutes late to the meeting due to traffic.

pinyin: Tā yīnwèi dǔchē suǒyǐ kāihuì chídào le shí fēnzhōng.

chinese: 我把钥匙忘在办公室的抽屉里了。
english: I left my keys in an office desk drawer.
parts: 我|把|钥|匙|忘|在|办|公|室|的|抽|屉|里|了
pinyin: Wǒ bǎ yàoshi wàng zài bàngōngshì de chōuti lǐ le.

chinese: 服务员送错了菜，经理马上道歉。
english: The wrong dish was served; the manager apologized at once.
parts: 服|务|员|送|错|了|菜|经|理|马|上|道|歉
pinyin: Fúwùyuán sòngcuò le cài, jīnglǐ mǎshàng dàoqiàn.

chinese: 地铁高峰期人很多，要注意安全。
english: The subway is packed at rush hour; stay safe.
parts: 地|铁|高|峰|期|人|很|多|要|注|意|安|全
pinyin: Dìtiě gāofēngqī rén hěn duō, yào zhùyì ānquán.

chinese: 她建议我们先查路线再出门旅行。

pinyin: Tā jiànyì wǒmen xiān chá lùxiàn zài chūmén lǚxíng.

chinese: 虽然意见不同，大家还是冷静地讨论。

parts: 虽|然|意|见|不|同|大|家|还|是|冷|静|地|讨|论
pinyin: Suīrán yìjiàn bùtóng, dàjiā háishì lěngjìng de tǎolùn.

chinese: 我们打算假期去南方城市放松几天。

parts: 我|们|打|算|假|期|去|南|方|城|市|放|松|几|天
pinyin: Wǒmen dǎsuàn jiàqī qù nánfāng chéngshì fàngsōng jǐ tiān.

chinese: 她一边跑步一边听有声书练听力。
english: She listens to audiobooks while running to train listening.

english: We agreed to watch the light show by the river tonight.

pinyin: Tā yīnwèi jiābān tài wǎn suǒyǐ méi gǎnshàng mòbān chē.

english: She flipped through a travel magazine over tea.

english: Please take your belongings when the train arrives.
